3) Implicit Diffusion Sample Module: In contrast to the
conventional diffusion model, which incurs substantial com-
putational overhead when applied to the global pedestrian
multiagent joint trajectory prediction, this study introduces the
implicit diffusion sample module. This module serves as an
innovative sampling mechanism aimed at enhancing overall
computational efficiency.
